prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, design a high-affinity protein binder targeting Epsilon toxin (ETX) (bacterial pore-forming toxin (select agent)) expressed by Clostridium perfringens. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. provide a approach for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Epsilon toxin (ETX); organism: Clostridium perfringens; catalogue version v1.0
